results.evidence: SignalCollector reads .specweave/docs/internal/ recursively, wired in LifecycleHookDispatcher STEP 4
upsertSignal() creates new entries with all required fields
upsertSignal() updates existing by category, appends incrementId, refreshes lastSeen
loadStore() returns empty on ENOENT, saveStore() creates file
Outer try/catch in collect() logs warning, never throws
evaluate() filters qualifying signals by count, declined, generated
console.log includes pattern name, count, /sw:skill-gen
Early return when config.suggest is false
Sort by confidence DESC, take first
top.suggested = true before saveStore
SKILL.md Step 2 displays qualifying patterns
SKILL.md Step 4-5 delegates to skill-creator plugin

SKILL.md Step 2 no qualifying patterns message
DriftDetector reads .claude/skills/*.md, compares against living docs. Wired in living-docs-sync.ts
console.warn with skill filename and stale references
Outer try/catch, logs warning, never blocks sync
Returns silently when no skills dir or empty
SKILL_GEN_DEFAULTS + loadConfig fallback. detection: off now checked in LifecycleHookDispatcher
SuggestionEngine uses config.minSignalCount. Confidence now uses configurable minSignalCount
declinedSuggestions Set excludes patterns from suggestions

Added to skillsSidebar in sidebars.ts

skill-gen SKILL.md links to extensible/skill-generation

findings.title: detection: off config was dead code — signals always collected
findings.status: FIXED — STEP 4 now reads skillGen.detection from config, skips when off

findings.title: Confidence hardcoded against default minSignalCount=3, ignoring user config
findings.status: FIXED — SignalCollector now accepts minSignalCount option, uses this.minSignalCount

findings.title: 26 Resources URLs pointed to non-existent /docs/commands/ pages (404s)
findings.status: FIXED — URLs now point to /docs/reference/skills#skill-name (existing page with anchors)
